lines.speaker: Barbara
lines.text: Please excuse me, I'm rather busy.

sections.title: With a Mahogany Homes contract for her house

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, I'm your contractor from Mahogany Homes, what did you want done?

lines.speaker: Barbara
lines.text: I'd like a Mahogany table built.

lines.speaker: Barbara
lines.text: I'd like a Mahogany drawer built.

lines.speaker: Barbara
lines.text: I'd like a Mahogany bed built.

lines.speaker: Barbara
lines.text: I'd like two Mahogany chairs built.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've finished with the work you wanted.

lines.speaker: Barbara
lines.text: Thank you so much! Would you like a cup of tea before you go?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aaah, nothing like a nice cupppa tea!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I better be off.
